description_long: This is a freestanding, arch-shaped promotional banner featuring characters from the Angry Birds franchise. The structure is primarily composed of a curved blue panel with printed graphics, including the Angry Birds logo and several character illustrations, most prominently the red bird at the top and sides. The arch is supported by two vertical legs, each decorated with additional character cutouts, giving the display a playful and eye-catching appearance. The surface appears smooth and glossy, likely made from printed plastic or laminated board, with a lightweight internal structure. The open center allows for easy passage underneath, making it suitable for use as an entrance or photo opportunity at events. The overall design is colorful and visually engaging, intended to attract attention in public or event spaces.
description: A colorful, freestanding arch banner featuring Angry Birds characters and logo, with a smooth, glossy surface and open center for passage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Angry Birds logo, red bird at the top, and character cutouts on both legs, with the open arch clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the arch and the depth of the supporting structure, with minimal visible graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the arch, with the red bird and other characters visible but less detailed than the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and structural depth, with little to no graphic detail visible.
attribute_banner_content: Angry Birds logo and character graphics
